title: జటాయువు త్యాగం, రాముని భక్తి
moral: ఎంతటి కష్టమైనా, ధర్మాన్ని నిలబెట్టడానికి నిలబడటం ఎప్పుడూ గొప్ప పనే.
main_character: Jatayu: A magnificent, ancient eagle with vast, golden-brown wings and sharp, watchful eyes. He possesses immense strength and a noble heart, deeply devoted to righteousness and the lineage of Dasaratha. Always the same character across every scene.
antagonist: Ravana: a powerful king-demon (rakshasa) with dark complexion and ten heads, each wearing a crown. Richly dressed in deep red and gold royal garments with elaborate gold ornaments and armlets. Carries multiple weapons including a sword and spear across his many arms. Commanding, imperious expression — fearsome but regal. Always the same character across every scene.
setting: The Dandakaranya forest in ancient India, near Panchavati. Lush green trees with ancient banyan roots, the gentle flow of the Godavari river, and the vibrant colours of forest flowers. Same location across every scene.

scenes.text: దండకారణ్యం పైన, జటాయువు తన విశాలమైన గోధుమ-రంగు రెక్కలను విప్పుకుని, గాలిని మెల్లగా నిమురుతూ ఆకాశంలో తేలియాడాడు. అతని పదునైన కళ్ళు అడవంతా జల్లెడ పడుతూ, ఎప్పుడూ కాపలా కాస్తున్నట్లు కనిపించాయి. కింద ఉన్న ఆశ్రమం వైపు అతని చూపులు స్థిరపడ్డాయి, అక్కడ రాముడు, సీత, లక్ష్మణులు ప్రశాంతంగా ఉన్నారని తెలుసు. ప్రాచీన మర్రిచెట్ల ఆకులు జటాయువు రెక్కల గాలికి మెల్లగా కదిలాయి — అడవి అంతా అద్భుతంగా ఉంది. ఆహా, ఈ అడవి ఎంత ప్రశాంతంగా ఉంది! అని మనసులో అనుకున్నాడు. పిల్లలూ, ఈ ప్రశాంతమైన అడవికి కొత్త రోజు ఏం తేబోతోందో మీకు తెలుసా?
scenes.image_prompt: The giant bird glides gracefully in the sky, its vast brown wings spread wide. Its sharp eyes scan the forest below, fixed on a peaceful hermitage. Golden hour sunlight filtering through the dense canopy, casting long, soft shadows, creating a tranquil and majestic atmosphere.
scenes.scene_visual: The giant bird glides gracefully in the sky, its vast brown wings spread wide. Its sharp eyes scan the forest below, fixed on a peaceful hermitage.
scenes.text_te_en: Dandakaaranyam Paina, Jataayuvu Tana Vishaalamaina Godhuma-Rangu Rekkalanu Vippukuni, Gaalini Mellagaa Nimurutu Aakaashanlo Teliyaadaadu. Atani Padunaina Kallu Adavantaa Jalleda Padutu, Eppudu Kaapalaa Kaastunnatlu Kanipinchaayi. Kinda Unna Aashramam Vaipu Atani Chupulu Sthirapaddaayi, Akkada Raamudu, Sita, Lakshmanulu Prashaantangaa Unnaarani Telusu. Praachina Marrichetla Aakulu Jataayuvu Rekkala Gaaliki Mellagaa Kadilaayi — Adavi Antaa Adbhutangaa Undi. Aahaa, I Adavi Enta Prashaantangaa Undi! Ani Manasulo Anukunnaadu. Pillalu, I Prashaantamaina Adaviki Kotta Roju Em Tebotondo Miku Telusaa?
scenes.text_en: High above the Dandakaranya forest, Jatayu spread his wide, brown wings and floated gracefully in the sky, gently caressing the air. His sharp eyes scanned the entire forest, always seeming to keep watch. His gaze settled on the hermitage below, where he knew Rama, Sita, and Lakshmana were living peacefully. The leaves of the ancient banyan trees swayed gently with the breeze from Jatayu's wings — the whole forest was wonderful. 'Oh, how peaceful this forest is!' he thought to himself. Children, do you know what the new day was about to bring to this peaceful forest?

scenes.text: ఆ ప్రశాంతత ఒక్కసారిగా చెదిరిపోయింది, పిల్లలూ! ఇంతలో, అడవిలో పక్షుల కిలకిలరావాలు ఆగిపోయాయి — ఒక నిశ్శబ్దం అలుముకుంది. జటాయువు తల పక్కకు వాల్చి, కళ్ళు సన్నగా చేసి, అడవిలోకి తీక్షణంగా చూశాడు. ఎక్కడి నుంచో ఒక నల్లటి నీడ ఆశ్రమం వైపు దూసుకు వస్తోంది... ఇది అడవిలో ఇంతకు ముందు ఎప్పుడూ చూడని వింత మనిషి. ఈ అడవిలో ఈ వింత మనిషి ఎవరు? అని తనలో తనే అనుకున్నాడు. సీతమ్మకు ఆపద రాకముందే జటాయువు ఆ ప్రమాదాన్ని గుర్తించగలుగుతాడా?
scenes.image_prompt: The giant bird tilts its head and narrows its eyes, peering intently into the silent forest. A dark, unfamiliar shadow rapidly approaches the hermitage from a distance. Bright, clear midday sun, but a growing shadow begins to stretch across the forest floor, hinting at an approaching threat.
scenes.scene_visual: The giant bird tilts its head and narrows its eyes, peering intently into the silent forest. A dark, unfamiliar shadow rapidly approaches the hermitage from a distance.
scenes.text_te_en: Aa Prashaantata Okkasaarigaa Chediripoyindi, Pillalu! Intalo, Adavilo Pakshula Kilakilaraavaalu Aagipoyaayi — Oka Nishshabdam Alumukundi. Jataayuvu Tala Pakkaku Vaalchi, Kallu Sannagaa Chesi, Adaviloki Tikshanangaa Chushaadu. Ekkadi Nuncho Oka Nallati Nida Aashramam Vaipu Dusuku Vastondi... Idi Adavilo Intaku Mundu Eppudu Chudani Vinta Manishi. I Adavilo I Vinta Manishi Evaru? Ani Tanalo Tane Anukunnaadu. Sitammaku Aapada Raakamunde Jataayuvu Aa Pramaadaanni Gurtinchagalugutaadaa?
scenes.text_en: That peace was suddenly broken, children! Suddenly, the chirping of birds in the forest stopped — a silence fell. Jatayu tilted his head, narrowed his eyes, and peered intently into the forest. From somewhere, a dark shadow was rushing towards the hermitage... It was a strange man, one never seen in this forest before. 'Who is this strange man in the forest?' he wondered to himself. Could Jatayu recognize the danger before it reached Sita?

scenes.text: ఆ నల్లటి నీడ ఆశ్రమాన్ని చేరగానే — రావణుడు సీతమ్మను బలవంతంగా పట్టుకున్నాడు. సీతమ్మ హాహాకారాలు ఆ అడవి నిశ్శబ్దాన్ని చీల్చాయి — జటాయువు కళ్ళు కోపంతో ఎర్రబడ్డాయి. తన భారీ రెక్కలు విదిలించి, పిడుగులా కిందకు దూకాడు. అన్యాయం! ఆగు, దుష్టుడా! అని ఆకాశం దద్దరిల్లేలా గర్జించాడు. ఒక పాత పక్షి అంతటి బలమైన రావణుడిని ఆపగలదా?
scenes.image_prompt: The giant bird, with eyes red with fury, violently flaps its massive wings and dives down like a thunderbolt. It lets out a sky-shattering roar, confronting the figure who has forcibly seized the woman. Also in this scene: Ravana: a powerful king-demon (rakshasa) with dark complexion and ten heads, each wearing a crown. Richly dressed in deep red and gold royal garments with elaborate gold ornaments and armlets. Carries multiple weapons including a sword and spear across his many arms. Commanding, imperious expression — fearsome but regal. Always the same character across every scene. SUPPORTING CHARACTER also in this scene: Sita: a graceful young woman (mid-twenties) with a fair golden complexion and long dark hair adorned with jasmine flowers. Wearing a silk saree in deep red or golden hues, with traditional gold ornaments: necklace, bangles, nose ring, and earrings. Eyes reflecting deep wisdom and quiet dignity. Serene, composed expression. Harsh, bright sunlight highlighting the struggle, with Ravana's shadowy form contrasting sharply against Sita's bright attire, a dramatic visual.
scenes.scene_visual: The giant bird, with eyes red with fury, violently flaps its massive wings and dives down like a thunderbolt. It lets out a sky-shattering roar, confronting the figure who has forcibly seized the woman.
scenes.text_te_en: Aa Nallati Nida Aashramaanni Cheragaane — Raavanudu Sitammanu Balavantangaa Pattukunnaadu. Sitamma Haahaakaaraalu Aa Adavi Nishshabdaanni Chilchaayi — Jataayuvu Kallu Kopanto Errabaddaayi. Tana Bhaari Rekkalu Vidilinchi, Pidugulaa Kindaku Dukaadu. Anyaayan! Aagu, Dushtudaa! Ani Aakaasham Daddarillelaa Garjinchaadu. Oka Paata Pakshi Antati Balamaina Raavanudini Aapagaladaa?
scenes.text_en: As that dark shadow reached the hermitage — Ravana forcibly seized Sita. Sita's cries of distress tore through the forest's silence — Jatayu's eyes turned red with anger. He flapped his massive wings and swooped down like a thunderbolt. 'Injustice! Stop, evil one!' he roared, his voice shaking the sky. Could an old bird stop someone as powerful as Ravana?

scenes.text: జటాయువు వెనకా ముందు ఆలోచించకుండా, రావణుడి రథంపై దూకాడు — తన పదునైన గోళ్ళతో, రెక్కల బలంతో ఆ రథాన్ని చీల్చాడు. గాలి హోరు పెరిగింది, అతని భారీ రెక్కలు వేగంగా కొట్టుకుంటూ రథాన్ని కదలనివ్వలేదు. తన వయసును, శక్తిని లెక్కచేయకుండా, ఒక్క క్షణం కూడా వెనక్కి తగ్గలేదు — అతని కళ్ళల్లో ధైర్యం కనిపించింది. సీతను విడిచిపెట్టు, లేదంటే నీకు మరణం ఖాయం! అని కేక పెట్టాడు. ఇంతటి పాత పక్షిని చూసి రావణుడు ఎలా స్పందిస్తాడో చూద్దామా?
scenes.image_prompt: The giant bird leaps onto the chariot, tearing at it with its sharp talons and powerful wings. Its large wings beat rapidly, preventing the chariot from moving, and courage shines in its eyes. Also in this scene: Ravana: a powerful king-demon (rakshasa) with dark complexion and ten heads, each wearing a crown. Richly dressed in deep red and gold royal garments with elaborate gold ornaments and armlets. Carries multiple weapons including a sword and spear across his many arms. Commanding, imperious expression — fearsome but regal. Always the same character across every scene. The sky is a brilliant blue with scattered white clouds, creating a vast arena for the aerial confrontation, full of dynamic movement.
scenes.scene_visual: The giant bird leaps onto the chariot, tearing at it with its sharp talons and powerful wings. Its large wings beat rapidly, preventing the chariot from moving, and courage shines in its eyes.
scenes.text_te_en: Jataayuvu Venakaa Mundu Aalochinchakundaa, Raavanudi Rathampai Dukaadu — Tana Padunaina Gollato, Rekkala Balanto Aa Rathaanni Chilchaadu. Gaali Horu Perigindi, Atani Bhaari Rekkalu Vegangaa Kottukuntu Rathaanni Kadalanivvaledu. Tana Vayasunu, Shaktini Lekkacheyakundaa, Okka Kshanam Kudaa Venakki Taggaledu — Atani Kallallo Dhairyam Kanipinchindi. Sitanu Vidichipettu, Ledante Niku Maranam Khaayan! Ani Keka Pettaadu. Intati Paata Pakshini Chusi Raavanudu Elaa Spandistaado Chuddaamaa?
scenes.text_en: Without a second thought, Jatayu pounced on Ravana's chariot — tearing at it with his sharp talons and the strength of his wings. The wind howled, and his massive wings beat rapidly, not allowing the chariot to move. Ignoring his age and strength, he didn't back down for a single moment — courage shone in his eyes. 'Release Sita, or death is certain for you!' he cried out. Let's see how Ravana would react to such an old bird!

scenes.text: కానీ రావణుడు అంతటి సులభంగా ఓటమిని అంగీకరించేవాడు కాదు. రావణుడు తన చీకటి శక్తితో జటాయువును తాకాడు — ఆ పక్షి రెక్కలు ఒక్కసారిగా వాలిపోయాయి. అతని శరీరం పెద్ద చప్పుడుతో నేలపై పడింది — ఎండిన ఆకులు చెల్లాచెదురయ్యాయి. నేలపై పడిన జటాయువు కళ్ళు, దూరంగా వెళ్తున్న రథాన్ని, సీతమ్మను వదలకుండా చూశాయి. రామా... లక్ష్మణా... సీత... అని చివరి శ్వాసలో మూలిగాడు. అసలు, జటాయువును ఎవరైనా చూస్తారా, సీతమ్మకు ఏం జరిగిందో తెలుసుకుంటారా?
scenes.image_prompt: The giant bird's wings collapse, and its body falls to the ground with a loud thud, scattering dry leaves. As it lies on the earth, its eyes remain fixed on the departing chariot and the woman within it. The protagonist watches from the side. Also in this scene: Ravana: a powerful king-demon (rakshasa) with dark complexion and ten heads, each wearing a crown. Richly dressed in deep red and gold royal garments with elaborate gold ornaments and armlets. Carries multiple weapons including a sword and spear across his many arms. Commanding, imperious expression — fearsome but regal. Always the same character across every scene. The bright daylight suddenly feels heavy and oppressive, with Jatayu lying in a patch of dappled shadow, looking vulnerable.
scenes.scene_visual: The giant bird's wings collapse, and its body falls to the ground with a loud thud, scattering dry leaves. As it lies on the earth, its eyes remain fixed on the departing chariot and the woman within it.
scenes.text_te_en: Kaani Raavanudu Antati Sulabhangaa Otamini Angikarinchevaadu Kaadu. Raavanudu Tana Chikati Shaktito Jataayuvunu Taakaadu — Aa Pakshi Rekkalu Okkasaarigaa Vaalipoyaayi. Atani Shariram Pedda Chappuduto Nelapai Padindi — Endina Aakulu Chellaachedurayyaayi. Nelapai Padina Jataayuvu Kallu, Durangaa Veltunna Rathaanni, Sitammanu Vadalakundaa Chushaayi. Raamaa... Lakshmanaa... Sita... Ani Chivari Shvaasalo Muligaadu. Asalu, Jataayuvunu Evarainaa Chustaaraa, Sitammaku Em Jarigindo Telusukuntaaraa?
scenes.text_en: But Ravana was not one to accept defeat so easily. Ravana struck Jatayu with his dark power — the bird's wings suddenly drooped. His body fell to the ground with a loud thud — dried leaves scattered. Jatayu's eyes, lying on the ground, watched the departing chariot and Sita, never giving up on her. 'Rama... Lakshmana... Sita...' he groaned with his last breath. Would anyone find Jatayu and learn what happened to Sita?

scenes.text: జటాయువు నేలపై పడిన చోట... రాముడు, లక్ష్మణుడు అన్వేషిస్తూ వచ్చారు. రాముడు ఆ దృశ్యాన్ని చూసి ఒక్కసారిగా నిశ్చేష్టుడయ్యాడు — అతని ముఖం పాలిపోయింది. జటాయువు కష్టం మీద శ్వాస తీసుకుంటూ, రాముని వైపు చూశాడు — అతని కళ్ళు ఆఖరి మాట చెప్పాలని తపించాయి. లంకేశ్వరుడు రావణుడు... దక్షిణ దిశగా... అని ఆఖరి మాటలు పలికాడు. జటాయువు పలికిన ఆ మాటలు విని రాముడు ఏం చేస్తాడు, అతని త్యాగాన్ని ఎలా గౌరవిస్తాడు?
scenes.image_prompt: The giant bird struggles to breathe, looking towards the man with eyes yearning to convey its final message. The man's face is pale with shock as he witnesses the bird's injured state. SUPPORTING CHARACTER also in this scene: Rama: a young prince with dark blue-black (shyama) complexion, tall and broad-shouldered, long arms reaching to his knees (Ajanabahu). During forest exile: wearing saffron-orange bark cloth (valkala), matted hair tied in a topknot (jata-mukuta), carrying his curved bow Kodanda and a quiver of arrows over his shoulder. Lotus-shaped eyes with a gentle reddish tinge at the corners. Noble, calm expression. Late afternoon sun, casting long, melancholic shadows, illuminating the sorrowful scene with a soft, warm glow that feels both poignant and hopeful.
scenes.scene_visual: The giant bird struggles to breathe, looking towards the man with eyes yearning to convey its final message. The man's face is pale with shock as he witnesses the bird's injured state.
scenes.text_te_en: Jataayuvu Nelapai Padina Chota... Raamudu, Lakshmanudu Anveshistu Vachchaaru. Raamudu Aa Drrishyaanni Chusi Okkasaarigaa Nishcheshtudayyaadu — Atani Mukham Paalipoyindi. Jataayuvu Kashtam Mida Shvaasa Tisukuntu, Raamuni Vaipu Chushaadu — Atani Kallu Aakhari Maata Cheppaalani Tapinchaayi. Lankeshvarudu Raavanudu... Dakshina Dishagaa... Ani Aakhari Maatalu Palikaadu. Jataayuvu Palikina Aa Maatalu Vini Raamudu Em Chestaadu, Atani Tyaagaanni Elaa Gauravistaadu?
scenes.text_en: Where Jatayu lay fallen on the ground... Rama and Lakshmana arrived, searching. Rama was stunned by the sight — his face turned pale. Jatayu breathed with difficulty, looking towards Rama — his eyes longed to speak his last words. 'Ravana, the lord of Lanka... towards the south...' he uttered his final words. What would Rama do after hearing Jatayu's words, and how would he honor his sacrifice?

scenes.text: జటాయువు చెప్పిన మాటలు విని, రాముడు ఆ వీరపక్షికి తండ్రి వంటివాడని గుర్తించాడు. రాముడు జటాయువు శరీరంపై తన చేతిని ఉంచాడు — అతని కళ్ళల్లో నీరు తిరిగింది. పవిత్రమైన మంత్రాలతో, సుగంధ ద్రవ్యాలతో జటాయువుకు అంతిమ సంస్కారాలు చేశాడు. తండ్రీ, నీ త్యాగం ఎప్పటికీ మరువలేము, అని రాముడు గద్గద స్వరంతో అన్నాడు. ఆ క్షణంలో, ఆకాశం నుండి పువ్వుల వర్షం కురిసింది — జటాయువు ఆత్మ శాంతిగా పైలోకాలకు పయనించింది.
scenes.image_prompt: The man places his hand on the giant bird's body, his eyes welling up with tears. He performs the final rites with sacred chants and fragrant substances, as flowers gently rain down from the sky. SUPPORTING CHARACTER also in this scene: Rama: a young prince with dark blue-black (shyama) complexion, tall and broad-shouldered, long arms reaching to his knees (Ajanabahu). During forest exile: wearing saffron-orange bark cloth (valkala), matted hair tied in a topknot (jata-mukuta), carrying his curved bow Kodanda and a quiver of arrows over his shoulder. Lotus-shaped eyes with a gentle reddish tinge at the corners. Noble, calm expression. Gentle dusk light, warm amber and fading to soft blues, peaceful and reverent, signifying the end of a noble life and the beginning of a new resolve.
scenes.scene_visual: The man places his hand on the giant bird's body, his eyes welling up with tears. He performs the final rites with sacred chants and fragrant substances, as flowers gently rain down from the sky.
scenes.text_te_en: Jataayuvu Cheppina Maatalu Vini, Raamudu Aa Virapakshiki Tandri Vantivaadani Gurtinchaadu. Raamudu Jataayuvu Sharirampai Tana Chetini Unchaadu — Atani Kallallo Niru Tirigindi. Pavitramaina Mantraalato, Sugandha Dravyaalato Jataayuvuku Antima Sanskaaraalu Cheshaadu. Tandri, Ni Tyaagam Eppatiki Maruvalemu, Ani Raamudu Gadgada Svaranto Annaadu. Aa Kshananlo, Aakaasham Nundi Puvvula Varsham Kurisindi — Jataayuvu Aatma Shaantigaa Pailokaalaku Payaninchindi.
scenes.text_en: Hearing Jatayu's words, Rama realized that this brave bird was like a father to him. Rama placed his hand on Jatayu's body — tears welled up in his eyes. With sacred chants and fragrant herbs, he performed Jatayu's last rites. 'Father, your sacrifice will never be forgotten,' Rama said with a choked voice. At that moment, a shower of flowers fell from the sky — and Jatayu's soul peacefully ascended to the heavens.

quality_scores.notes: This story boasts excellent grammar, a compelling narrative arc, and strong child engagement through effective suspense hooks. However, its primary weakness lies in the sparse and underdeveloped dialogue; many scenes lack direct speech, and characters like Ravana are silent. To elevate this to an award-worthy piece, the editor must enrich character dialogue, ensuring every scene contributes to the story's progression through spoken words, and consistently show emotions through action rather than direct statements.

moral_te_en: Entati Kashtamainaa, Dharmaanni Nilabettadaaniki Nilabadatam Eppudu Goppa Pane.
moral_en: No matter how hard it is, standing up for what is right is always a great thing to do.
